description: Tested header navigation in mobile view (375x812) and found that the Contact link correctly exists but has a typo in its route ('/contcat'), leading to a 404 error.

issues.name: Contact link has wrong route (/contcat) and results in 404
issues.description: Expected: The Contact link in the header should point to "/contact" and navigate to the correct page. Actual: The Contact link in the header points to "/contcat" and results in a 404 error page.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to http://localhost:3002 using a mobile viewport.
Click on the "Contact" link in the navigation header.
Observe the URL and the page content.
issues.expectedBehavior: The Contact link in the header should point to "/contact" and navigate to the correct page.
issues.actualBehavior: The Contact link in the header points to "/contcat" and results in a 404 error page.
